Google Maps Image Gallery - Find the Navatars

6402 images extracted | Look for car/vehicle icons

Known Navatar models: CITY_CAR, CLASSIC_SEDAN, CLASSIC_SUV, PICKUP_TRUCK, SEDAN, SUV
Known drawable names: navatars_default_chevron, default_chevron_icon, vehicle_base_m, quantum_gm_ic_directions_car_black_24/48
Tip: Look for top-down car silhouettes in blue/white. The icons are likely 24x24 to 96x96.
|
